title: The Rescue Target Changes
description: Pages 16–16 focus on the rescue target changes, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the active characters in this part.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Colosseum Announcer, Unknown person #4, Tontatta as the allies learn about Mansherry's healing power and start searching the palace while the battles continue under the Birdcage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wonder if Robin and the others are alright...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They will be fine! Usoland's friends are all really strong!

dialogue.speaker: Colosseum Announcer
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the middle of the year, and I was wondering if I was a kid, I would have been a

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: Miss Rebecca, we've got to go save Princess mansherry!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You're going to be alone; is that okay!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: I'll be fine! Lucy and the others are gonna be here any minute.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Do me a favor and get back here quick!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Father's gotta be standing somewhere on it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: sigh... so someone's finally showed up, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Looming before her, her mother's killer...

summary: The Rescue Target Changes develops the chapter's Dressrosa conflict through Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Usopp, Unknown person #3, Colosseum Announcer, while preserving the OCR dialogue and keeping unclear speakers readable.
